evidence: Wonderful movie of Harriet and the heartbreaking events of that time.
The story is more about camping and survival techniques.
To think this movie could be award worthy is a joke.
Jennifer Hudson is amazing!!! She should win many awards for her performance.
The bad acting ruin what could have been a decent movie.
You won't want to miss a thing in this movie.
Shows how powerful people are when we put our hands together to make a difference.
Horrible to think this REALLLLLLLY took place.
Shows you can work thru fear when you care so much about someone.

summary: The user enjoys biographical and inspirational films with a preference for fast pacing and high production quality. They value emotional resonance and are sensitive to acting quality, often expressing strong feelings about the content they watch.
